labeling.method: frame-verified layout (t=30) + vocabulary/band rules over all 13,313 raw lines
honesty: GROUND TRUTH CORRECTION: this video has NO story-text overlay — it is full-screen gameplay with HUD; the reddit story exists only as TTS narration. The sweep record's 'story overlays' description was wrong and is corrected in S5-SWEEP-LANE-A.md.
0 of 13,313 lines are captions. The creator did not caption this video; all 1,882 clustered caption events are game HUD/watermark/CTA graphics.

'serious stories.' tagline echoes a narrated phrase but persists ~20s un-word-timed — labeled incidental_text (deliberate graphic); the missing graphic_text class is a promotion-time ontology question, consistent with the SpaceX cell's end-cards.
